params.text:
# NetworkX in LynxKite

LynxKite lets you access 400+ algorithms from NetworkX. Many of these can be executed on NVIDIA GPUs simply by setting `NX_CUGRAPH_AUTOCONFIG=true`.

This workspace shows off a few example operations without any overarching story.
